findings.description: The DX term definition captures only a condensed version of the page content. The image shows an extensive explanation of デジタルトランスフォーメーション including a taxi/autonomous driving example and the etymology of 'X' for Transformation — these narrative details are omitted from the term definition. Acceptable compression for a term entity.

reviewer_notes: R1.1 fix confirmed: figure::p211::6 caption jp is '試験にはコレが出る！' as required. All 6 key terms on the page (DX, ビッグデータ, データマイニング, ゲーミフィケーション, 情報リテラシー, デジタルディバイド) are captured with accurate jp/zh/en surfaces and definitions. The figure entity correctly represents the exam callout box which summarizes all 6 topics. Only gap is the narrative detail in the DX explanation omitted from the term entity, which is low severity.
